sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Bridgewater Bancshares (BWB) director granted 1,146 Common Stock shares
feed.summary: Bridgewater Bancshares Inc. director David J. Volk received a grant of 1,146 shares of Common Stock as compensation, increasing his direct holdings to 32,284 shares. This transaction, acquired at $0.00 per share, was a grant or award, not an open-market purchase, and also notes his indirect ownership of 298 shares through Volk Advisory Corp. The filing reflects an update to his ownership position without indicating a discretionary trade by the insider.

feed.title: Enterprise Products Partners (NYSE:EPD) Shares Down 3.2% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Enterprise Products Partners (NYSE:EPD) shares fell 3.2% to $37.83 on Tuesday with significantly increased trading volume. Despite analyst upgrades and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target of $37.73, the stock experienced selling pressure. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.55 (5.8% yield) and reported strong earnings, with insider confidence signaled by CEO share purchases.

feed.title: TRNO PE Ratio & Valuation, Is TRNO Overvalued
feed.summary: This article analyzes the valuation of Terreno Realty Corp (TRNO), concluding that it is currently in the "Fair zone." Its forward PE ratio of 36.87 is considered fair compared to its five-year average of 46.14, with a fair price estimated between $60.05 and $88.52 using a relative valuation method. The analysis also compares TRNO's P/B ratio, FCF yield, and P/S ratio against historical averages and competitor benchmarks, noting its P/S ratio is above the industry average but justified by strong revenue growth.

feed.title: Skillz (NYSE: SKLZ) grows 2025 revenue to $104.5M but posts $70.4M loss
feed.summary: Skillz Inc. reported its financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, with revenue growing to $104.5 million but incurring a net loss of $70.4 million. Despite the loss, the company saw a 16% year-over-year improvement in Adjusted EBITDA and positive Adjusted EBITDA from its RZR ad-tech segment. Skillz ended the year with $194.5 million in cash and cash equivalents, aiming for sustained profitability and optimized capital structure.

feed.title: 20/20 Biolabs 10-K: Revenues $2.05M, Net Loss $(3.74)M
feed.summary: 20/20 Biolabs reported fiscal-year revenue of $2.045 million, a 16.7% increase, driven by higher OneTest and CLIAx sales and a shift to a premium test mix. The company recorded a net loss of $(3.739) million, an improvement of 32.7% versus the prior year, with gross profit increasing to $0.605 million. Operational developments include the launch of OneTest for Longevity and expansion into multi-cancer screenings for veterans.

feed.title: C3.ai (AI) director’s tax-driven sale and matched buy, $3,509 remitted
feed.summary: C3.ai, Inc. director Jim H. Snabe conducted offsetting trades of Class A Common Stock on March 27, selling 10,000 shares at $8.08 and buying 10,000 shares at $7.73. The sale was necessitated by "exit tax" obligations related to his emigration from Denmark, and he remitted $3,509 in short-swing profits to the company. Following these transactions, Snabe directly holds 385,000 shares and indirectly holds 28,000 shares through BJHS Invest ApS.

After these dispositions, Palomaki directly holds 161,760 shares of CMT common stock.

This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1(c) trading plan adopted in December 2025. Following the sale, Foster directly holds 108,758 shares of BioLife Solutions common stock.

feed.title: Dyne Therapeutics Announces Participation at 2026 Academy
feed.summary: Dyne Therapeutics will present three posters at the AMCP 2026 Annual Conference, focusing on Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) and myotonic dystrophy type 1 (DM1). The company aims to prepare for potential US launches of its neuromuscular medicines in 2027 and 2028 by engaging with payers to highlight the benefits of its investigational therapeutics. This participation helps contextualize clinical trial results for managed care experts and ensures access decisions reflect patient needs.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Consolidated ordered to pay injured worker reassigned to lower-paying role
feed.summary: A Tennessee workers' compensation court has ordered Coca-Cola Consolidated to pay an injured 30-year employee nearly $20,000 after he was reassigned to lower-paying roles upon returning to work. The ruling emphasizes the financial risks employers face when return-to-work placements do not properly reinstate an injured worker to an equivalent position. The court's decision hinged on the employee's 30 years of tenure, finding it reasonable for him to accept the lower-paying role rather than abandoning accumulated benefits.

feed.title: ProFrac (ACDC) CCO reports share disposals tied to vesting awards
feed.summary: Matthew A. Greenwood, Chief Commercial Officer of ProFrac Holding Corp. (ACDC), reported several dispositions of Class A common stock on March 27, 2026. These transactions, which included returning shares to the issuer for vested performance-based and restricted stock awards and disposing of shares to cover withholding taxes, resulted in Greenwood directly holding 134,350 shares of ProFrac Class A common stock after these awards. The disposals were mostly settled in cash at $6.63 per share.

Technical indicators are mixed, and a pre-market price drop indicates short-term bearish sentiment, leading to a "Hold" recommendation.

feed.title: O’Reilly Auto Schedules First Quarter 2026 Results Release
feed.summary: O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. (ORLY) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 29, 2026, after market close, with a conference call for investors and analysts set for April 30, 2026. A recent analyst rating on ORLY stock is a Buy with a $109.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates ORLY as Neutral, citing strong operating profitability and positive cash generation balanced by significant balance-sheet leverage and rich valuation.

feed.title: AT&T (T) Stock: Scotiabank Raises Price Target to $31.50 | T Sto
feed.summary: Scotiabank has maintained its "Sector Perform" rating for AT&T (T) and raised its price target from $31.00 to $31.50, indicating a 1.61% increase. This adjustment follows a series of varying analyst expectations for AT&T, which is the third-largest US wireless carrier, with its wireless business contributing almost 70% of its revenue. Wall Street analysts currently project an average target price of $29.93 for AT&T, suggesting an upside of 5.73% from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $22.20, indicating a potential downside of 21.58%.

feed.title: CSX grant helps Lowcountry Food Bank buy produce from veteran farmers
feed.summary: The Lowcountry Food Bank received a grant from CSX Transportation to purchase produce from local veteran farmers. This initiative aims to support veteran farmers and address food insecurity, particularly among veterans, by distributing fresh produce. The program aligns with the food bank's "Growing Food Locally" initiative, which partners with small, historically underserved farms to provide nutritious food and economic opportunities.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urges Driven Brands Holdings Inc. Investors With Substantial Losses to Contact the Firm Before May 8th
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Driven Brands Holdings Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased shares between May 9, 2023, and February 24, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Driven Brands made material errors in its financial statements, leading to restatements and a significant drop in stock price. Investors have until May 8, 2026, to apply to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: WPS requests approval to increase electric rates $16 per month by 2028
feed.summary: Wisconsin Public Service (WPS), a subsidiary of WEC Energy Group, has filed a request with the Public Service Commission of Wisconsin to increase electric and natural gas rates for its customers in 2027 and 2028. The typical residential electric bill would increase by about $11 in 2027 and an additional $5 in 2028, totaling approximately $16 over two years. WPS states these rate hikes are necessary to fund system reliability improvements, recover costs for new renewable energy projects, and maintain safe and reliable service.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. Class A Stock: Navigating AI Investments and Core Strengths in a Competitive Landscape
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Class A continues to be a major player in tech, driven by its dominant search business and expanding AI capabilities. The company is investing heavily in AI, including custom TPUs and the Google AI Mode, to maintain its competitive edge and drive future growth despite increased capital expenditures. Investors should monitor upcoming earnings for insights into CapEx efficiency and the monetization of new AI features, as the company faces competition in a rapidly evolving tech sector.

feed.title: Xcel Energy 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Xcel Energy announced it will host a conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time, to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. The earnings report will be released before the market opens on the same day. The call details, including dial-in numbers and a webcast link, are provided for investors and the media.

This revision reflects Citigroup's updated outlook for the company, while still indicating confidence in its performance. Analyst forecasts suggest an average target price of $385.83 for SHW, implying an 18.46% upside from its current price.

feed.title: Range Resources (NYSE: RRC) CEO awarded shares, sells 15,000
feed.summary: Range Resources CEO Dennis Degner reported receiving a grant of 76,334 common shares on March 27, 2026, as a performance-based award, valued at $47.65 per share. Concurrently, a deferred compensation account associated with him sold 15,000 common shares at $46.21 each on March 30, primarily to cover tax obligations. After these transactions, Degner directly held 835,980 common shares, along with additional shares in a deferred compensation account and unvested stock.

feed.title: Datacentrex (DTCX) delays 2025 10-K; acquired Dogehash on Dec 15, 2025
feed.summary: Datacentrex (DTCX) has filed a Form NT 10-K, notifying the SEC that it will delay filing its Annual Report for the year ended December 31, 2025, due to needing more time to complete its audit. The company expects to file within the 15-day extension period allowed by Rule 12b-25. The filing also discloses that Datacentrex acquired Dogehash Technologies, Inc. on December 15, 2025, with Dogehash being treated as the accounting acquirer, which will impact the comparability of pre-acquisition financial results.

feed.title: Bank of America Maintains Buy on CVNA Carvana Co Mar 2026
feed.summary: Bank of America Securities maintained a Buy rating on Carvana Co (CVNA) on March 24, 2026, stemming from a bullish outlook on Carvana’s potential to become a leading independent used-car dealer in the U.S. This rating signals continued analyst confidence in Carvana's growth strategy, particularly its distribution scale, rather than a new valuation anchor. Meyka AI rates CVNA with a B+, factoring in market comparisons, sector performance, financial growth, and analyst consensus, while emphasizing that investors should conduct their own due diligence.

feed.title: [144] Xos, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC has filed a Form 144 notice concerning proposed transactions in Xos, Inc. common stock. The filing details multiple open-market purchases of XOS shares made by Fidelity in 2021 and specifies the broker's identification. This regulatory document is typically used to report proposed sales by affiliates but in this instance records past transactional history and broker details, without specifying the timing or cash-flow treatment for any resale.

feed.title: Theriva Biologics Raised to Buy From Hold by Maxim Group
feed.summary: Maxim Group has upgraded Theriva Biologics (NYSE:TBIO) from a Hold rating to a Buy rating. The firm also set a new price target of $9.00 for the company's stock. This upgrade suggests a positive outlook on Theriva Biologics' future performance.

The fair price for ARCB is estimated to be between $63.58 and $92.47, making its current price of $93.45 about 1.06% overvalued. The article also provides details on ARCB's Price-to-Book ratio, Free Cash Flow yield, and comparison to competitor valuations, noting that its P/S ratio appears unsustainable given its revenue growth.

feed.title: TORM plc (TRMD) issues 43,697 new A-shares from RSU exercises
feed.summary: TORM plc has announced an increase in its share capital by issuing 43,697 new Class A shares, each with a nominal value of USD 0.01, as a result of Restricted Share Unit exercises. This transaction, executed without pre-emption rights for existing shareholders, brings TORM’s total share capital to USD 1,021,233.39, divided into 102,123,339 A-shares. The new shares are expected to be listed on Nasdaq Copenhagen and aim to align employee incentives with company performance.

feed.title: GLJ Maintains Sell Rating on Tesla (TSLA)
feed.summary: GLJ Research has maintained its Sell rating on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) with a price target of $24.86, despite forecasting Q1 2026 deliveries higher than Wall Street consensus. Analyst Gordon Johnson believes the expected growth is not from organic demand but rather from margin-dilutive subsidy arbitrage and a weak comparison base, noting a significant decline from peak quarterly deliveries. Tesla, a prominent electric vehicle and clean energy company, faces scrutiny regarding its growth drivers.

feed.title: This Bond Pays You In Bitcoin Upside – And Moody’s Just Rated It Ba2
feed.summary: Moody's Ratings has assigned a Ba2 provisional rating to a $100 million Bitcoin-backed bond issued by the Business Finance Authority of the State of New Hampshire. This bond offers investors potential Bitcoin upside participation, but repayment is solely from Bitcoin sales, not taxpayer funds. The structure includes safeguards like a 1.60x collateral buffer and a 1.40x liquidation trigger to manage Bitcoin's price volatility, and investors in the Series A-2 tranche can receive 15% of any Bitcoin price increase after all principal and interest are paid.

feed.title: Lamb Weston's Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales Rise 3% Y/Y
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. reported solid third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, with both net sales and earnings beating Zacks Consensus Estimates. While net sales increased 3% year-over-year to $1,564.8 million, adjusted earnings declined 37% to 72 cents due to reduced gross profit and elevated SG&A expenses. The company also updated its full-year fiscal 2026 outlook, narrowing its adjusted EBITDA projection and lowering capital expenditure estimates.

feed.title: Halliburton Acquires Sekal To Expand Drilling Automation Capabilities
feed.summary: Halliburton has acquired Sekal AS from Sumitomo Corporation to bolster its digital drilling automation capabilities. This acquisition combines Halliburton's LOGIX automation and remote operations technologies with Sekal's DrillTronics platform. The integration is expected to improve well placement, optimize wellbore hydraulics, enable real-time rig automation, and reduce well delivery times by up to 25%.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (AMD): Billionaire Ray Dalio Trims Stake
feed.summary: Billionaire Ray Dalio's Bridgewater Associates has reportedly trimmed its stake in Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (AMD) by over 7% in the fourth quarter of 2025, despite previously increasing its holdings. AMD is considered a strategic alternative to NVIDIA by many hedge funds, with a significant catalyst being a $60 billion GPU supply agreement with Meta Platforms. While AMD shows potential, the article suggests that other AI stocks might offer greater upside and less downside risk.

feed.title: Catalyst for Girls Award recipients to be honored at luncheon | NONPROFIT REGISTER
feed.summary: Girls, Inc. of Metro Denver is preparing for its annual My Bold Future luncheon on May 13, where it will honor the 2026 Catalyst for Girls award recipients: Crocs, Inc. (Corporate Catalyst), The Colorado Trust (Community Catalyst), and Michelle Hawkins (Individual Catalyst). The event, sponsored by United Airlines, will also distribute $110,000 in scholarships to Girls, Inc. members. The organization focuses on developing "strong, smart, and bold" girls through mentoring and research-based programs.

feed.title: AMD Delivers Breakthrough MLPerf Inference 6.0 Results
feed.summary: AMD's latest MLPerf Inference 6.0 submission shows significant advancements with its Instinct MI355X GPUs, surpassing 1 million tokens per second at multinode scale and expanding into new workloads like text-to-video generation. The results demonstrate competitive single-node performance against NVIDIA B200 and B300 GPUs, efficient scale-out, and broad ecosystem reproducibility, largely attributed to the AMD ROCm software stack. These achievements position AMD as a strong contender in the generative AI inference market, with a clear roadmap for future Instinct GPU series and rack-scale solutions.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment (CZR) Price Forecast: Bullish Flag Targets Trendline Breakout
feed.summary: Shares of Caesars Entertainment (CZR) have shown increased strength since a February reversal from a long-term trend low. The stock is currently consolidating in a bullish flag pattern, attempting to break out above a persistent downtrend line. A successful breakout from this flag and the downtrend line could signal a significant trend change for CZR, propelled by strong demand seen in a previous rally.

feed.title: Healthcare: Increased Clarity on Drug Pricing and Tariffs Led to a Rebound in Q1
feed.summary: The Morningstar Healthcare Index, after lagging due to drug pricing uncertainty and tariffs, is expected to see solid performance in 2026, driven by its defensive nature, innovation, and benefits from AI. The sector is considered undervalued overall, with healthcare plans and devices looking most attractive. AI is anticipated to significantly reduce the time required to bring new pharmaceuticals to market, benefiting biopharma.
